summary: V3 backend + frontend full validation. 21/21 pytest cases pass for V3 schema (child age=7, stats=1 except stamina=2, hunger=100, body=köylü_giysisi, 2 parent NPCs, 6 family quests with açık+kilitli mix), advance mechanic (4-week turn, 48-week age-up to 8), 4-stage emotional escalation (merak→kafa_karışıklığı→sinirlilik→düşmanlık→düşmanlık verified), parent endearment dialogue ('Yavrum/Çocuğum/evladım'), all child gates (attack/crime/quest_accept/marry/job=asker/travel-to-kale → 403), child-permitted flows (travel köy ok, job işsiz eligible, work runs 1 week), items/use_item/unequip, /api/game/jobs, /api/game/skills (returns tree+stats+skills+xp+perks), /api/game/family-quests (6 quests + player_age). Frontend e2e via playwright: login → /oyun, HUD shows calendar 'Ocak 1247 Kış · 1. hafta', season flavor 'Soğuk acımasız', hunger+health bars, ÇOCUK badge, BİR HAFTA İLERLE button advances calendar to 2. hafta. CharacterSheet: all 4 stat-* + 4 skill-* testids visible, parents (İclal Tuna fırıncı 29, Şahin Tuna marangoz 37) listed, child notice 'Çocuksun — sadece işsiz ve köylü yapabilirsin', jobs grid with lock icons on age/stat-gated jobs (asker, çiftçi, demirci çırağı, etc.), action-work present, NO crime/attack buttons. Inventory: all 6 slot-* testids visible, Köylü Giysisi equipped in body, Ekmek with KULLAN button, clicking shows toast 'Ekmek kullanıldı (+6 açlık)'. Family page: 6 quests with Açık/Kilitli/Tamamlandı badges, parent giver names, objective progress text, ödül values. Backend BASE_URL=https://living-world-sim-4.preview.emergentagent.com works.
critical_code_review_comments: items.apply_use_effects returns capped 'applied' delta — so eating ekmek at hunger=100 shows applied.hunger=0 even though item consumed. Acceptable but consider returning 'wasted' indicator so UI can warn user (toast still shows '+0 açlık' or similar).

Calendar shape uses {turn, week_in_month, month_no, month_name, year, season, season_flavor} — no week_of_year. Documentation in problem statement mentions 'season' as one of 4 — confirmed working. Consistent field naming is good.

Return shape mostly consistent: most endpoints return {state, ...}; use_item, unequip, travel, work return wrapped. /advance/new return state directly — UI handles both via body.state||body fallback. Recommend full standardization in a future iteration.

Login for an existing user with valid v3 state redirects directly to /oyun (NewGame intro only shown when no game). This is correct, but test@k.com pre-seeded game means the V3 intro 'Yedi yaşındasın' text path is only verified via source code (NewGame.jsx line 47-49), not visually for this credential.

/api/game/family-quests returns mixed initial statuses; one quest 'Komşu Çocukla Tanış' showed as 'Tamamlandı' for test@k.com because that user previously chatted with NPCs ≥3 times — normal carryover; consider fresh user for clean demo screenshots.

success_rate.frontend: 100% — all v3 HUD/Character/Inventory/Family flows verified, child gates enforced in UI, item use toast works, advance updates calendar

test_credentials: test@k.com / test123 (already had a v3 game state). V3 tests auto-register fresh users v3_<uuid>@k.com / test123.
seed_data_creation: Each pytest test class registers a fresh user and calls /api/game/new to create a deterministic v3 child world. No persistent seed needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run V3 regression with: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_kkm_v3.py -v. Older test_kkm_api.py and test_kkm_new_features.py are V2-era and will FAIL against current backend (day-based vs week-based, no child gates) — do NOT rerun unless backend is reverted. BASE_URL = https://living-world-sim-4.preview.emergentagent.com. Calendar field is 'turn' (1 turn = 1 week, 48 turns/year). Jobs endpoint returns {jobs:[{job, eligible, missing, requirements}]} — key is 'job' not 'profession'. Skills endpoint returns {stats, stat_xp, skills, skill_xp, perks, tree}. use_item returns {state, applied:{hunger,health}} where applied is the delta after cap (can be 0 if already full). Equipment slots: weapon/head/body/hands/legs/feet. NPC emotional_stage returned in chat response as 'emotional_stage' (string, one of merak/kafa_karışıklığı/sinirlilik/düşmanlık). Frontend testids confirmed: hud-calendar, hud-season, hud-hunger, hud-health, advance-week, nav-character, nav-inventory, nav-family, stat-{strength,intelligence,charisma,stamina}, skill-{combat,trade,crafting,social}, action-work, slot-{weapon,head,body,hands,legs,feet}, use-ekmek, new-game-start, login-{email,password,submit}.
rca of the issue: No bugs. Initial 5 failing tests were test-only schema mismatches (week_of_year→turn, profession→job, SKILL_PERKS→tree, ekmek applied=0 due to hunger cap at 100). Updated assertions to match the actual v3 contract and all 21 tests pass.
